verdict_reasoning: SRC (p60-Src) is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the cytoplasmic (inner) leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. Its kinase domain, SH2, and SH3 domains all face the cytoplasm. No extracellular domain exists. Pre-no checklist: (1) no cell-surface-directed antibody/ADC/CAR-T program targets the SRC protein body from outside; (2) not an ectodomain-shedding TM precursor — no TM domain; (3) no covalent/wash-resistant tethering to a TM partner on the outer leaflet; (4) no documented minority PM outer-leaflet pool — its PM association is exclusively inner-leaflet; (5) no cancer/cell-death/activation/germline outer-leaflet display documented for SRC protein body specifically. Inner-leaflet lipid anchoring is explicitly excluded from surface accessibility by the scoring rules.
